blocks.title: Chicago Jewish Teens
blocks.subtitle: Chicago's premier Jewish day camp for teens ages 12-17. Adventures, sports, friendships, and authentic Jewish identity - all from the heart of Northbrook, IL.

blocks.heading: More Than a Camp - A Life Experience

children.text: Teen eXtreme is a bold new concept in Jewish camping. As a child grows so does his ability for self-discovery, adventure, bonding with friends, and appreciation of group dynamics.

items.title: 50 Years of Excellence
items.desc: Founded on 50 years of CGI camping principles - the largest worldwide network of Jewish camping.

items.title: Expert Staff
items.desc: Counselors hand-picked for experience, expertise, and a genuine love for teen development.

items.title: CGI Network
items.desc: Part of the global CGI camp network - a trusted name in Jewish education.

quotes.quote: My son came home from Teen Camp a completely different person - more confident, more Jewishly aware.
quotes.name: Rachel K.

items.q: What ages does Chicago Jewish Teens serve?
items.a: Our programs are designed for Jewish teens ages 12–17.
